query_text: good ski for the ice coast

results.explanation: Armada ARV 106 strongly matches on: playfulness. Moderate match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "most playful ski I've ever been on — butters, spins, everything feels easy." Review: "Playful factor is off the charts" Review: "floats in powder"

Blizzard Rustler 10 strongly matches on: playfulness. Moderate match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "Incredibly playful — you can butter, spin, and smear with ease" Review: "Pop off everything, spin easily, land softly" Review: "The rocker profile floats well in powder"

Faction Dictator 3.0 strongly matches on: playfulness. Moderate match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "great for butters, natural features, and creative skiing" Review: "the playfulness is addictive" Review: "floats well in powder"

Moment Wildcat 108 strongly matches on: playfulness. Moderate match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "stiff enough to charge" Review: "chargy than the Atris" Review: "playful enough to throw tricks"

Elan Ripstick 96 strongly matches on: playfulness. Moderate match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "At 96mm they're right in the sweet spot" Review: "carbon Amphibio construction is unique — different flex on each edge for easier turn initiation" Review: "Decent playfulness and edge grip"

Salomon QST 106 strongly matches on: playfulness. Moderate match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "not as stable as heavier chargers" Review: "Handles variable snow conditions with ease" Review: "Playful enough for drops and airs"

Moderate match on: stiffness, playfulness, powder_float. Review: "incredibly stiff" Review: "Not as stiff but more playful" Review: "Not outstanding in any single category but competent everywhere off-piste, playfulness is nice"

Moderate match on: stiffness, playfulness, powder_float. Review: "Stiff enough for experts but not punishing" Review: "impressive stiffness for all-mountain ski" Review: "good playfulness for an all-mountain ski"

Moderate match on: stiffness, playfulness, powder_float. Review: "Stable at speed, doesn't wander." Review: "Wide enough for off-piste" Review: "struggles only in deep powder"
